scripts.publish:local:core: pnpm --filter @shz/core build && pnpm --filter @shz/core publish --registry http://localhost:4873 --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:local:components: pnpm --filter @shz/components build && pnpm --filter @shz/components publish --registry http://localhost:4873 --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:local:nx-generators: pnpm --filter @shz/nx-generators build && pnpm publish ./tools/nx-generators/dist --registry http://localhost:4873 --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:local: pnpm publish:local:core && pnpm publish:local:components && pnpm publish:local:nx-generators
